bidpilot.b1: Built a full-stack platform automating the bid and RFP lifecycle with NLP document parsing, structured requirement extraction, compliance mapping, strategy generation and response drafting.
bidpilot.b2: Engineered backend workflows that convert unstructured procurement documents into actionable data models for sourcing teams.
bidpilot.b3: Applied requirement gathering, iterative delivery and stakeholder demos in a cooperative build cycle.

zarynx.b1: Designed a TypeScript and Node.js service that governs when AI agents can execute autonomously versus requiring human approval.
zarynx.b2: Integrated Auth0 Token Vault and JWT-secured APIs, with 4/4 automated tests passing on core policy contracts.

dreamos.b1: Developed a React and TypeScript frontend with Supabase/PostgreSQL backend, row-level security, consent-gated server functions and append-only audit trails.
dreamos.b2: Implemented BFS graph clustering over user data patterns, plus one-click export and permanent deletion.

foundry.b1: Built a /v1/chat/completions REST gateway with request validation, license enforcement and per-call receipts for traceability.
foundry.b2: Architected an Express API, PostgreSQL, Drizzle ORM and React monorepo for drop-in OpenAI SDK integration.

detail.availability: Available for SWE internship conversations, product engineering collaborations and design-heavy software builds.

profile.summary: Computer Science undergraduate at VIT Bhopal with 1+ years of object-oriented programming in Java, C++ and TypeScript. Selected projects below from 60+ shipped systems built in cooperative team environments. Strong grasp of data structures, algorithms, API design, automated testing and CI/CD.
profile.education: Vellore Institute of Technology (VIT), Bhopal. B.Tech, Computer Science and Engineering, 2024-2028. CGPA: 8.94 / 10.0.
profile.coursework: Data Structures & Algorithms, Object-Oriented Programming, Database Systems, Operating Systems, Computer Networks, Discrete Mathematics, Probability & Statistics.

experience.title: Project Samvardhanam
experience.body: Independently built and deployed a full-stack social-impact platform for donations, volunteer onboarding and engagement analytics from requirements through production.

achievements.research: Co-author: cardiovascular population analysis via information-theoretic methods. Manuscript under review, Diagnostics, 2026.
achievements.awards: Meta PyTorch Hackathon Finalist; AWS 10,000 AI Ideas & Convolve Semifinalist; NPTEL Gold in Marketing Analytics; NPTEL Silver in Cloud Computing.
achievements.delivery: 45+ international hackathons with user requirement scoping, MVP builds and shipping under 24-48 hour deadlines.
